name: Evil HERO Wild Cyclone
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｅ－ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>イービルヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ワイルド・サイクロン
desc:
"Elemental HERO Avian" + "Elemental HERO Wildheart"
Must be Special Summoned with "Dark Fusion". If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap Cards until the end of the Damage Step. If this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: Destroy all Set Spells/Traps your opponent controls.
mnst_eff:
"Elemental HERO Avian" + "Elemental HERO Wildheart"
Must be Special Summoned with "Dark Fusion". If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap Cards until the end of the Damage Step. If this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: Destroy all Set Spells/Traps your opponent controls.
eff:
"Elemental HERO Avian" + "Elemental HERO Wildheart"
Must be Special Summoned with "Dark Fusion". If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap Cards until the end of the Damage Step. If this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: Destroy all Set Spells/Traps your opponent controls.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack
Speed Duel GX: Duelists of Shadows

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-down Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-down Trap Cards
summoning: Requires only specific monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
